title: Lambda Music Pack
description: A resource pack that changes (at least most) of Minecraft's ingame OSTs to the soundtracks of Valve's Half-Life franchise.
body:
Hello and welcome!

To BradMineCraft's Lambda Music pack, what this music pack does is very simple! 

It replaces all of or at least most of Minecraft's music with Valve's Half-Life's music in the form of a texture pack (nothing else required)

(It should actually work for the different versions now!)
